commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix video/file-type search and ls sort header bug

- Add sys1 examples for finding videos/images across device using find -ls
  with proper extension grouping and sort -k7 -rn (macOS-compatible)
- Add reformatOutput handler for find -ls output: parses inode/size/path
  columns and converts byte counts to human-readable (K/M/G), handles
  filenames with spaces via f[10...].joined()
- Fix -S flag detection in ls reformatOutput: cmd.contains("-S") was false
  for combined flags like -lhS (no literal "-S" substring). Now extracts
  the flags token and checks for uppercase S within it
- Fix Swift escape: \( in triple-quoted string was parsed as interpolation;
  changed to \\( / \\) to produce literal shell \( \) in the prompt
- Fix sort flag: sort -rh is GNU-only; use sort -rn for macOS compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: install slash commands to ~/.claude/commands/ instead of ~/.claude/skills/

Claude Code only recognizes slash commands in ~/.claude/commands/ (user-level)
or .claude/commands/ (project-level). The old ~/.claude/skills/ path was
invisible to Claude Code, so /tmux-* commands never appeared.

Also updates web-install.sh to use the same correct path.

Fix audio mismatch gate: MySQL ENUM expansion, numpy type casting, threshold tuning

- Expand MySQL ENUM for mimic_sessions.status to include 'audio_mismatch'
  via ALTER TABLE MODIFY COLUMN in migration (MySQL doesn't auto-expand)
- Add values_callable to Enum(MimicSessionStatus) so SQLAlchemy uses
  lowercase .value strings matching what MySQL stores (fixes KeyError: 'ready')
- Cast np.float32 to native float() before persisting audio_confidence/offset
  (pymysql rejects numpy types)
- Raise audio confidence threshold from 5.0 to 10.0 (conf ~5 is noise,
  real matches are ~56+)
- Add admin Frame Data download button for mimic sessions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: explicitly set --model opus for workers to prevent Sonnet fallback

When booting 10+ workers simultaneously, some fail to resolve the Max
subscription and fall back to Sonnet on API billing. Adding --model opus
ensures all workers use the correct model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor README with modern badge-based design (#2)

Replaced broken external image URLs with reliable shields.io badges, fixed broken HTML markup, corrected typo (Sevices → Services), and reorganized content into clear sections: Languages, Frontend, Backend & Databases, Web3, and Testing. Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: skip caching POST requests in service worker

The Cache API doesn't support POST requests. Add an early return for
non-GET requests to prevent console errors during recipe imports and
other API mutations. Bump cache version to activate the update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix file search: correct find patterns, smart fallback, better empty message

Bug 1 — LLM generated "*.office*" (dot-prefix extension pattern, never matches)
instead of "*office*". Fix: replace sys1 find example with three explicit ones
using -iname "*keyword*" so the model learns the correct pattern.

Bug 2 — Sparse-output fallback was a no-op for find commands (no pipes to strip,
so fallback == cmd, retry skipped). Add extractFindKeyword/extractFindFolder
helpers + find-specific fallback that rebuilds the command as:
  find <folder> -iname "*<keyword>*" 2>/dev/null
This catches any bad pattern the LLM generated and retries with a correct one.

Bug 3 — Empty output "(command returned no output)" confused Turn 2 into
responding "just tell me the filename". Changed to explicit message:
"The command ran but found no matching results. Tell the user nothing was found."

Also add grep example to sys1: "find files containing budget in documents?"
→ CMD: grep -ril "budget" ~/Documents 2>/dev/null | head -20

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: stop writing thinkingDefault on individual agent entries

OpenClaw's AgentEntrySchema is strict and does not allow thinkingDefault
on agents.list[] items. This field is only valid at agents.defaults level.
Writing it to individual agents caused Zod validation failure and gateway
crash on startup.

commit.message:
feat(saju-mbti): 앱 전면 개선 - 7단계 리팩토링 완료

Phase 1: 기반 레이어
- UserProfile 타입 + storage CRUD 메서드 추가
- LuckyColor {hex, name} 구조로 lucky color 버그 수정
- validation.ts 입력값 유효성 검사 유틸리티

Phase 2: 재사용 컴포넌트
- BirthInfoForm: MBTI + 생년월일시 통합 폼 (프로필 프리필, 유효성 검사)
- FortuneScoreGauge: SVG 반원 게이지 애니메이션
- SkeletonLoader: 글래스모피즘 로딩 스켈레톤

Phase 3: 운세 점수 시스템
- fortuneScore.ts: 오행 상생/상극 기반 0-100점 계산
- 주간 점수, 트렌드 분석 (rising/stable/falling)

Phase 4: 신규 페이지
- 온보딩: 3단계 위저드 (환영 → 정보입력 → 캐릭터 공개)
- 프로필: 캐릭터 히어로 + 정보 수정 + 알림 설정

Phase 5: UX 개선
- 홈 리디자인: 프로필 기반 인사말 + 캐릭터 히어로
- 네비게이션: 오늘운세/내정보 탭 추가, MBTI 탭 제거
- DailyFortuneWidget: 운세 점수 + 트렌드 + 온보딩 CTA

Phase 6: 오늘의 운세 강화
- 주간 뷰 탭 (오늘 | 이번 주)
- 7일 점수 카드 + 바 차트 + 주간 요약

Phase 7: 폴리시
- 사주/운명 페이지 프로필 프리필 + 유효성 검사
- 운명 캐릭터 페이지 BirthInfoForm 적용
- ErrorBoundary 글로벌 에러 처리
- 스캔 페이지 stale closure 버그 수정

Fix flyer: add image proxy for CORS, redesign with white background

Photos weren't loading because Supabase Storage lacks CORS headers for
canvas. Added /api/images/proxy route to serve images with proper headers.

Redesigned flyer: clean white background, large main photo + 4 thumbnails,
big price, property details grid, green "ready" badge, address, and
Maninos contact bar with all 3 office numbers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial implementation of Wave accounting MCP server

6 FastMCP tools wrapping the full Wave GraphQL API (52 operations):
- account: chart of accounts CRUD + archive + search
- party: customers (full CRUD) + vendors (read-only)
- transaction: invoices (full lifecycle + payments) + money transactions (BETA)
- item: products & services CRUD + archive + search
- reference: businesses, users, currencies, countries, sales taxes, estimates
- report: synthesized business summary, account balances, customer balances

Static Bearer token auth, async httpx with rate-limit backoff,
dual transport (STDIO/SSE on port 3076).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add undervoltage watchdog to auto-restart Pi services

After undervoltage events, PM2 services can hang without crashing.
This cron-based watchdog detects undervoltage via vcgencmd, checks
proxy health, and restarts PM2 with a two-strike rule and cooldown.
